programme.desc: In Reunion Island, Nelson, 10 years old, dreams of a career in music and applies to the show ''Star Kids''. Pierre Leroy, an artist whose career is faltering, happens to be on tour on the island. Nelson asks him for advice, but things do not go well with the disillusioned old singer.

programme.title: Partir Un Jour (ATV)
programme.desc: Julien left his home town to build himself a bigger life in Paris, leaving his memories behind him. But one day the published author and future father has no choice but to return.

programme.title: Lakay Nou (ATV)
programme.desc: As each year, Grandpa wants to get all the family together to celebrate Haitian Flag Day, but Henri and Myrlande are submerged by their workload.

programme.title: Lakay Nou (ATV)
programme.desc: The restaurant is the victim of its own success, creating a feeling of dissatisfaction within the community. Henri is letting the pressure get to him and takes his stress out on his son.

programme.title: Natures Humaines (ATV)
programme.desc: Real welcomes the three couples for their first day at the chalet. After getting them to take part in a contest to choose their bedroom, Real explains the living rules on his land. Shocking revelations are not long in coming.

programme.title: Natures Humaines (ATV)
programme.desc: On the second day, Real's students must succeed in cooking an egg in a tin placed on the snow. Tensions mount and one of the participants wants to leave the adventure.

programme.title: Ramadam (ATV)
programme.desc: From stage to cinema, classical music, artistic immersion and performances, ''Ramdam'' showcases culture in all its forms and offers an opportunity to meet the artists themselves. Those involved discuss their career, their interpretation of the work, the creative process and share their view of the subjects raised.

programme.title: Just Kids (ATV)
programme.desc: Jack, 19; Lisa, 17, and 10 year-old Mathis, suddenly find themselves orphaned. Whilst Lisa distances herself from the other two, Jack is made Mathis' guardian. A new life begins... But how to assume the responsibility of bringing up a child when you are hardly more than a teenager yourself?

programme.title: Temps De Chien (ATV)
programme.desc: The end of the pandemic put an end to Alice's side job, writing funeral orations, and her novel's publication is canceled. To help her out of this very bad patch, her fortune teller suggests writing horoscopes for cats and dogs.

programme.desc: Concerned about the sudden disappearance of their colleague Sunlight, the dancers of the famous Parisian cabaret La Nouvelle Eve contact the police. Without losing her usual wit, Captain Marleau, assigned to the case, shakes up the nightlife scene.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans (ATV)
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: Just Kids (ATV)
programme.desc: Jack, 19; Lisa, 17, and 10 year-old Mathis, suddenly find themselves orphaned. Whilst Lisa distances herself from the other two, Jack is made Mathis' guardian. A new life begins... But how to assume the responsibility of bringing up a child when you are hardly more than a teenager yourself?

programme.title: Temps De Chien (ATV)
programme.desc: The end of the pandemic put an end to Alice's side job, writing funeral orations, and her novel's publication is canceled. To help her out of this very bad patch, her fortune teller suggests writing horoscopes for cats and dogs.

programme.title: Terrain De Jeu (ATV)
programme.desc: In the Lofoten archipelago in northern Norway, Raed Hammoud discovered an unusual football pitch nestling in the fjords: the Henningsvaer Stadion. In Oslo, he notes that the Norwegians, great fans of winter sports, are also, above all, football fans.

programme.title: Terrain De Jeu (ATV)
programme.desc: In a small village on the Amalfi Coast, Raed Hammoud explores a spectacular football pitch nestled between rugged mountains and the Mediterranean Sea: the Diego Armando Maradona Stadium. In Naples, he meets the people behind SSC Napoli, the pride of the city.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans (ATV)
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: Rugby - Top 14 (ATV)
programme.desc: French Rugby Union Championship match (Top 14).

programme.title: Rugby - Top 14 (ATV)
programme.desc: French Rugby Union Championship match (Top 14).

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf (ATV)
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Interieurs (ATV)
programme.desc: In Marseille, Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits the woodworking workshop of Carles and Demarquet. She then goes to the workshop of Senimo, a carpenter in Ivry-sur-Seine.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes (ATV)
programme.desc: In Courseulles-sur-Mer, the Juno Beach centre aims to divide its carbon footprint by five by 2050. In its reuse centres, the Respire association, present in the Caen area, offers all kinds of second-hand items. The Hangar Zero, in Le Havre, is becoming a place dedicated to the ecological transition.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique (ATV)
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'Actu (ATV)
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts (ATV)
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2 (ATV)
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 64' Actu (ATV)
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco ! (ATV)
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'Invite (ATV)
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Yetili (ATV)
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili (ATV)
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi (ATV)
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi (ATV)
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: C'Est Mathematique ! Avec Iman (ATV)
programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca (ATV)
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Les Jeux De La Fontaine (ATV)
programme.desc: Frog and her guide cross the starting line in the para-athletics women's 5,000 metres, but nothing goes quite according to plan.

programme.title: Belfort Et Lupin (ATV)
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: Les Triples (ATV)
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot (ATV)
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'Aventure Du Monde Des Mondes (ATV)
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Foot Go (ATV)
programme.desc: Eight year-old Tata arrives in a new school. She wants to join its football team but isn't allowed to; after all she's a girl! Refusing to be beaten, Tata decides to set up her own girls' team with the help of her gang of friends.

programme.title: Marocains Du Ciel (ATV)
programme.desc: Touria Chaoui is expelled from her examination room: she is accused of cheating. She is devastated. Only one of her teachers, Noukira, suspects a setup and investigates among the students.

programme.title: Mission Info (ATV)
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Falo (ATV)
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'Hebdo (ATV)
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: L'Echappee Belge (ATV)
programme.desc: From Charleville-Mezieres to the Langres plateau, Adrien Joveneau and comedian Manon Lepomme travel to the headwaters of the Meuse, exploring its heritage, nature and local encounters.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera (ATV)
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene (ATV)
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance (ATV)
programme.desc: A Norman born in Granville, Johanna discovered tango in New York, a love at first sight that led her to Argentina. She fell in love with the country and with Maximiliano, whom she met during a class. Argentine of modest origins, former footballer and future mathematics teacher, he turned to dance after being deeply moved by a song.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match (ATV)
programme.desc: Silver medalist in long jump at the Tokyo 2020 Paralympic Games: Dimitri Pavade is Pierre Classen's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada (ATV)
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Mad Concrete Dreams Ep5 (ATV)
programme.desc: Upon achieving the coveted status of a landlord, mounting debts lead Soo-Jong into participating a staged kidnapping, yet the plan spirals out of control as the fake kidnapping turns dangerously real.

programme.desc: Upon achieving the coveted status of a landlord, mounting debts lead Soo-Jong into participating a staged kidnapping, yet the plan spirals out of control as the fake kidnapping turns dangerously real.

programme.desc: Stay tuned to this spin-off of "One Night Food Trip" toured by Korean and local celebrities and find out the delicacies you can't miss in different Asian countries!

programme.desc: Based on webtoon, the series follows a woman who goes on a blind date, meets two charming guys, and navigates her feelings to discover true love.

programme.desc: Three chefs, joined by their manager and assistant, travel to Hong Kong for inspiration. In this cultural crossroads, they meet remarkable people, discover new stories, and create fresh "recipes for life".

programme.title: Stage Fighter (ATV)
programme.desc: is a survival program for male dancers to compete in ballet, modern dance and Korean traditional dance genres. They will present spectacular performances with unique style.
